about.title: Who I am and what I do
about.description:
Developer with over 10 years of IT experience across demanding sectors including banking, logistics, aeronautics and healthcare. Today my focus is on intelligent automation and full stack development helping companies gain time and scale through technology.

I work with N8N and OpenAI to build high-impact automations, from simple integrations to complex AI-driven flows. On the development side, I use Node.js, TypeScript, React, GraphQL and databases like PostgreSQL (Supabase) and MongoDB, with infrastructure on AWS (EC2).

I have hands-on experience monitoring infrastructure with Zabbix, Grafana and Datadog, which allows me to build solutions with stability and production in mind from day one. Available for remote or hybrid work, CLT or PJ.

description: Responsible for developing and maintaining all company automations, connecting tools, APIs and internal flows to increase operational efficiency.
Created automations with N8N for automatic content generation and publishing on social media.
Integration between platforms using Supabase, JavaScript and REST APIs.
Autonomous management of the company's technical infrastructure.
Implemented AI on the platform to answer student questions, reducing human support load.
Participated in company improvement metrics, generating annual savings of over R$ 100,000.
Participated in platform migration to a new technology, unifying projects and generating financial savings and client satisfaction.
Responsible for receiving, analyzing and fixing bugs reported by students on the platform.
Worked on both backend and frontend using MongoDB, Node.js, React, TypeScript, GraphQL and RESTful APIs.
Created and maintained monitoring dashboards with Grafana and alerts with Zabbix.
Participated in the action that prevented a million-dollar fraud attempt against the company.
Promoted three times for exceptional performance over 6 years.
Responsible for sustaining transaction authorizers, maintaining 100% uptime.
Created automations for banking processes (banking vans, FTP, report reconciliation).
Led technical support team and created technical documentation.
Administration and configuration of systems and servers (Windows Server, Linux).
Recovered a server attacked by malware with minimal data loss.
Created a backup automation that accelerated problem resolution for clients.
Remote customer service, router configuration and local network setup.

projectList.name: SCGTR
projectList.description: Complete operational and financial management system for transportation companies. Register daily routes, define values per route and package, track unresolved occurrences (PNR), and monitor earnings in real-time. Built with ASP.NET Core 9, Entity Framework, SQLite and React.

projectList.name: Blog API
projectList.description: RESTful blog API built with Node.js following a layered architecture (controllers, models, middlewares). Complete structure for post management and user authentication.

projectList.name: Snake Game
projectList.description: Classic Snake game built in JavaScript with responsive design using Tailwind CSS.

projectList.name: JotaWallet
projectList.description: Personal finance management app with an intuitive dashboard and customizable reports.

projectList.name: Text Encryptor
projectList.description: File encryption tool built with TypeScript and Node.js. Receives a file, encrypts its content while maintaining the original format, and allows decryption using the corresponding key file.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: What people say about my work

list.name: Tauana Santos
list.text: It's rare to find talent like João Pedro's. Few people get the chance to work with a good analyst who knows what he's doing and who is also a great mentor, I had that opportunity and I'm very grateful, because much of what I know today at the company where I work now, I had the pleasure of learning from him. 'Ridiculously efficient' is the phrase that comes to mind when I think of João. I worked with him for nearly two years at DM, collaborating on the Systems team. I was particularly impressed by his ability to handle the most difficult problems effortlessly, he had a command over all the company's systems that seemed like something personal to him. João Pedro's ability to learn everything very quickly is admirable, even if he didn't have mastery of a subject, he would help solve it, he would look up what he didn't know on his own, and not because he wanted something in return, but because he knew it would be good for the whole team, he thought about the team, about what was best for the team and for the company. The professional I am today was built by my own efforts, but working with him and another colleague of ours motivated me to be a better and more agile analyst today, and with an important detail, working with quality and organization. João would be an asset to any team, as a team member or a leader, he has my strongest recommendation, because in addition to being a quality professional, he knows how to lighten the team's mood at just the right moment. Any company would be lucky to have João Pedro as an employee.

list.name: Barreto
list.text: My brother, how are you? Man, I don't know if I've managed to make my gratitude clear to you, but damn, João was the best referral I've ever received in my life. Seriously, without a doubt. The guy is absolutely flying here. Growing technically and very aligned with the culture. Incredible 🙌 Thank you so much. It worked out so well that I'm thinking about hiring a second João lol
list.context: CEO's message to the person who referred me

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Real systems, in production, built from scratch.
projects.ecosystemTitle: A complete internal tool suite built for Euphonia Oratória
projects.ecosystemDescription: All projects below are part of an internal tool ecosystem I developed autonomously for the company I currently work for. From AI-powered WhatsApp onboarding automation, content generation and social media publishing to real-time student goal tracking. Each piece was built from scratch, integrated with Supabase, and designed to scale.

list.name: Comunidade
list.description: Goal tracking system for 100+ students with real-time sync via Supabase. Allows viewing individual progress, accessing mentorship meetings via embedded Zoom, listening to podcasts and much more.

sar.situation: Students had no central platform for goals, sessions, and content.
sar.action: 3-module suite via Supabase: real-time goals, embedded Zoom, and native podcast player.
sar.result: 100+ students in production. Full mentorship experience in one environment.

sar.situation: 100+ students with no way to track goals individually.
sar.action: Real-time goal tracking module via Supabase for students and the team.
sar.result: Full progress visibility with visual alerts for students falling behind.

sar.situation: Zoom sessions forced students to leave the platform.
sar.action: Zoom embedded directly into the platform.
sar.result: Students join sessions without switching tools.

sar.situation: Audio content scattered across external platforms.
sar.action: Integrated podcast player with episodes organized by module.
sar.result: Content consumption inside the platform, no tab-switching needed.

list.name: Atena Dashboard
list.description: Dashboard for the AI-powered WhatsApp onboarding automation system (GPT-4o-mini). Displays student status in real time and monitors active onboarding journeys, allowing you to identify when a student is struggling and provide immediate support.

sar.situation: Manual onboarding with no progress visibility or early-struggle alerts.
sar.action: Dashboard + WhatsApp automation with AI (GPT-4o-mini) and n8n, with real-time status.
sar.result: Fully automated onboarding. Team spots and acts when a student gets stuck.

list.name: Euphonia Admin
list.description: Internal admin tool for general environment control. Dispatch and management of weekly, monthly and one-off messages. Indicator dashboard with diverse community control metrics.

sar.situation: Scattered operations: manual dispatches, no indicators, no admin hub.
sar.action: Admin tool with scheduled dispatches (weekly, monthly, one-off) and metrics dashboard.
sar.result: Centralized operations, manual tasks eliminated, full community visibility.

sar.situation: Testing payment integrations required triggering the real gateway.
sar.action: Tool that finds a customer and fires simulated events (confirmed, overdue, refunded).
sar.result: Tests in seconds without the real gateway. Debug time drastically reduced.

sar.situation: Tracking each student's onboarding step required manual DB queries.
sar.action: Panel showing the current step with controls to advance, fix, or re-dispatch messages.
sar.result: Full flow control without touching the database.

sar.situation: No consolidated view of individual, cohort, or community health.
sar.action: Three dashboards: per student, general overview, and community.
sar.result: Real-time decisions with immediate identification of at-risk students.

sar.situation: WhatsApp dispatches sent manually, one by one.
sar.action: Two automated flows: monthly (billing) and weekly (follow-up), with full logs.
sar.result: Bulk dispatches in minutes. Manual communication process eliminated.

sar.situation: Sessions, attendance, and meeting types managed in external spreadsheets.
sar.action: Full module for sessions, mentorship types, and per-student attendance tracking.
sar.result: Centralized history integrated into each student's profile.

sar.situation: Profile photos missing or outdated on the platform.
sar.action: Upload tool with student search, preview, and Supabase Storage.
sar.result: Photo updates in seconds with full team control.

list.name: Link Hub
list.description: Personal link aggregator with categorization and cloud sync. Replaces browser bookmarks with a clean, searchable interface accessible from any device.

sar.situation: Links scattered across bookmarks on multiple devices.
sar.action: Aggregator with categorization, search, and cloud sync via Supabase.
sar.result: Instant access to all links from any device.

list.name: My Task Manager
list.description: Full-featured task manager with projects, recurring routines and step-by-step status control. Supports daily, weekly, monthly and yearly frequencies with a visual overdue indicator and team task creation.

sar.situation: No system to manage recurring tasks, projects, and team routines.
sar.action: Manager with projects, routines (daily to annual), step-based status, and delay alerts.
sar.result: In production managing daily projects and routines with immediate visibility of pending tasks.

list.name: Onboarding
list.description: New student onboarding process 100% conducted by AI. Atena guides each student through the full flow: group assignment, first meeting scheduling, credential delivery, and mentorship introduction — with zero manual intervention.

sar.situation: Every new student required manual onboarding: groups, meetings, credentials.
sar.action: Conversational onboarding conducted by Atena (AI) via Supabase Edge Functions and OpenAI.
sar.result: 100% automated onboarding. Same consistent experience from welcome to first access.
